title: Domestic abuse support services letter confirming refused admission to a refuge
body: "To get an evidence letter from an organisation providing domestic abuse support service confirming refused admission to a refuge, you should:   fill in this sample letter send it to the organisation providing domestic abuse support services   You can use this as evidence if you’re applying for legal aid to divorce or separate from an abusive partner.  If you wish to provide evidence of staying at a refuge please use the ‘Get a letter from an organisation providing domestic abuse support services’ template. "
